reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username and returned it in response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent interface and sidebar showing agents.
Clicked on "QA-20260515-004551-zi06" agent in sidebar — Agent opened and displayed the landing page with message input.
Verified agent status — Status shows "idle" in the status indicator.
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." in input field — Message entered successfully.
Clicked "Send message" button — Message sent and agent started processing (status changed to "working").
GitHub account access request card appeared — Card asked "Allow access to GitHub to look up the authenticated username?" with GitHub account already selected.
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button — Permission granted for GitHub account connection.
Second permission request appeared for "GET /user" API call — Dialog appeared asking to allow GitHub API call.
Selected "Always allow read:user" option — Permission granted for reading user profile data.
Waited for response to complete — Agent completed in 42 seconds, status returned to "idle".
Verified response content — Response clearly shows: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." confirming the GitHub tool successfully retrieved the username.
Captured full page screenshot — Screenshot saved showing complete chat session with response and GitHub username.
